desc: This dataset contains sales transaction data from Blinkit, an online grocery delivery platform. It contains sales data from Blinkit, including product details, order quantities, revenue, and timestamps.
goal: Examine customer purchase frequency, basket composition, and product co-occurrence patterns to understand buying behavior and preferences. By identifying which products are frequently bought together, this descriptive analysis helps uncover common customer segments and preferences, aiding in product mix optimization and marketing strategy development.
name: Visual Analytics System blinkit_goal2_1742643607

plan.path: The user browses View 1 at the [Overview] level and learns about the overall distribution of customer behaviors by viewing `avg_order_value` and `total_orders` across customer segments. Next, the user selects specific ranges of interest in View 1, triggering updates in exploration-level Views 2 (most purchased products) and View 5 (geographic distribution by area). The user further drills down into View 3 to explore product co-occurrence patterns and View 4 to analyze basket size distributions across customer segments. In View 6, time-based trends of product purchases are detailed, allowing the user to identify seasonality or time-dependent patterns in purchasing behavior.

effect.description: Filter customer data points based on selected ranges in `total_orders` and `avg_order_value`, applied to subsequent views.

visualization.description: Scatter plot visualizing `total_orders` vs. `avg_order_value` for each customer, color-coded by customer segment.

effect.description: Filter subordinate views for the selected product ID.

visualization.description: Bar chart showing the top 10 most purchased products, aggregated by quantity, color-coded by category.
Bar chart displaying the top 10 most frequently co-occurring product pairs in customer baskets.
Box plot visualizing basket size distribution stratified by customer segments.
Heatmap displaying total orders and average order total by area and customer segment.
encodings: tooltip - area, customer segment, order summary stats

effect.description: Select a time range for filtering data points across all linked views.

visualization.description: Line chart showing the trend in product purchase frequency over time.

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW customer_analysis AS SELECT customer_id, customer_segment, avg_order_value, total_orders FROM blinkit_customers;
sqls.name: customer_analysis

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW product_details AS SELECT oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, p.category, p.brand FROM blinkit_order_items oi joining blinkit_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id;
sqls.name: product_details

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW co_occurrence_pairs AS SELECT oi1.order_id, oi1.product_id AS product_id_1, oi2.product_id AS product_id_2 FROM blinkit_order_items oi1 JOIN blinkit_order_items oi2 ON oi1.order_id = oi2.order_id WHERE oi1.product_id < oi2.product_id GROUP BY oi1.order_id, oi1.product_id, oi2.product_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;
sqls.name: co_occurrence_pairs

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW customer_segmentation AS SELECT customer_id, customer_segment FROM blinkit_customers;
sqls.name: customer_segmentation

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW area_analysis AS SELECT a.area, a.customer_segment, SUM(o.total_orders) AS total_orders, AVG(o.order_total) AS avg_order_total FROM blinkit_customers a JOIN blinkit_orders o ON a.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY a.area, a.customer_segment;
sqls.name: area_analysis

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW product_frequency AS SELECT product_id, COUNT(order_id) AS frequency FROM blinkit_order_items GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 10;
sqls.name: product_frequency

tasks.method: Combine data from `blinkit_customers`, `blinkit_orders`, and `blinkit_order_items` using `customer_id` and `order_id` as keys. Characterize distributions of `total_orders` and `avg_order_value` for each customer segment using a scatter plot. Points are color-coded by `customer_segment`, while tooltips display `total_orders`, `avg_order_value`, and `area`. (V3, I3).
tasks.objective: Understand how purchase frequency and order value vary across customer segments and identify patterns or correlations between these metrics.
tasks.type: retrieving values | combining data | characterizing distributions

tasks.method: Aggregate `blinkit_order_items` by `product_id` to calculate purchase frequency and merge this data with corresponding product metadata (e.g., `category`, `brand`) from `blinkit_products`. Sort the data by frequency and visualize the top 10 products with a bar chart.
tasks.objective: Identify the most popular products and trends by category or brand, supporting inventory planning and marketing strategies.
tasks.type: retrieving values | aggregating | finding extrema | sorting

tasks.method: Compute the co-occurrence of `product_id` pairs within the same `order_id` in `blinkit_order_items`. Use association rule mining to identify frequently purchased product combinations and visualize the top 10 pairs using a bar chart (V1). Include multi-select filtering for custom exploration. (I2).
tasks.objective: Discover and analyze common product pairings to optimize product placement, bundling strategies, and recommendations.
tasks.type: retrieving values | computing derived values | clustering

tasks.method: Calculate the basket size distribution (sum of `quantity` for each `order_id`). Stratify the distribution by `customer_segment` and visualize the results using box plots (V4), with drill-down functionality to explore specific basket compositions. (I5).
tasks.objective: Examine variations in basket sizes across customer segments and identify segment-specific buying patterns.

tasks.method: Group customers by `area` and calculate aggregated metrics such as purchase frequency and average `order_total`. Visualize this geographic distribution with a heat map (V2), with interactive filtering on `customer_segment` and `area`. (I1).
tasks.objective: Explore regional variations in buying behavior, aiding localized inventory management and marketing efforts.

tasks.method: Analyze trends in product purchase frequency over time by aggregating product-level data using `order_date`. Visualize these trends using a line chart (V5) with brush interaction to select time ranges and filter data across other visuals. (I4).
tasks.objective: Identify seasonality and time-dependent trends in product purchases for inventory and marketing planning.

tasks.method: Cluster customers into distinct groups using `total_orders`, `avg_order_value`, and `customer_segment`. Compare the clusters in terms of demographic and purchase behavior traits, and visualize them on a scatter plot with cluster assignments as the color encoding.
tasks.objective: Uncover natural groupings of customers to enhance segmentation and uncover trends in purchase behaviors.
